compiled_state.description:
Authoring ergonomics for humans and agents.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `rebar workflow new <name>` scaffolds a valid skeleton with a $schema modeline.
- [ ] `rebar workflow validate`/`--dry-run` runs the FakeRunner (no tokens) and collects ALL errors in one pass.
- [ ] A worked 3-step example workflow ships.
Files: src/rebar/_cli/__init__.py, src/rebar/llm/workflow/
compiled_state.title: WS-B4: CLI scaffolding + validate/--dry-run
